internal_issues.description: WIN-014 verdict should be Self-Contradicted (not Misleading). C4 curmudgeon confirmed at confidence 0.82 (up from 0.7 in c3): dome claims 2009 SG null confirms model while PRED-TIER-3 predicts positive 10-13 µGal pulse from same instrument class. Verdict-change patch file written (monitor/decisions/suggested-patches-verdictchange-2026-05-04T09-24.json). Pending human review.

SEC-8b.3 still enumerates E-PRED-A/B/C/D as live dome commitments; WIN-014 detail_evidence says E-PRED-C was absent from predictions.html as of 2026-04-21. The two pages are inconsistent. Needs EXP to reconcile.
Level-3 residuals wording conflated raw SG noise floor with post-reduction signal — FIXED this run.
Sign convention inconsistency: WIN-014 used negative sign for PRED-TIER-2 but predictions.json uses positive — FIXED this run.
Unsourced 6-29 deg claim in cascade note — FIXED this run (replaced with several degrees).
Annual-periodicity argument missing from WIN-016 detail_evidence (flagged in c2 and c3) — FIXED this run.
Quotation paraphrase in WIN-016 detail_verdict_text (added 'data was pulled' not in dome source) — FIXED this run.
8 April-EOM PREDs (PRED-077/081/085/087/088/090/106/111) at d=4.0 past close. Monitoring issue created; d=8 trigger at 2026-05-08T00Z. Analyst proposal consumed.

Patch updates verdict, finding, detail_verdict_text, tldr_verdict, tldr_evidence. Five-field change requires human signoff.
